title: auto water drop enhanced
description: Stops fall damage by auto-placing and picking up water when you fall
body:
# Stop dying from falling down again!

Auto Waterdrop Enhanced automatically places water beneath you when you fall from a dangerous height, ensuring a safe landing every time.

**With flexible configuration options, the mod will:**
- Grab a water bucket from your inventory
- Place water just before impact
- Instantly pick the water back up, restoring your inventory to its original state

**Stop losing to fall damage!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rtKANmgi4ZA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
